name: FARO Technologies, Inc.
description: FARO Technologies, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, markets, and supports 3D measurement, imaging, and realization solutions worldwide. The company offers portable 3D measurement devices, computer-aided measurement and imaging software, and various laser trackers, laser scanners, and 3D imager systems. Its products are used for inspecting components, rapid prototyping, reverse engineering, and documenting large spaces or structures in 3D, serving industries such as manufacturing, construction, and public safety.
